root_text.an6.96:1.3: Tathāgatassa arahato sammāsambuddhassa pātubhāvo dullabho lokasmiṁ, tathāgatappaveditassa dhammavinayassa desetā puggalo dullabho lokasmiṁ, ariyāyatane paccājāti dullabhā lokasmiṁ, indriyānaṁ avekallatā dullabhā lokasmiṁ, ajaḷatā aneḷamūgatā dullabhā lokasmiṁ, kusale dhamme chando dullabho lokasmiṁ.
root_text.an6.96:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, channaṁ pātubhāvo dullabho lokasmin”ti.

translation_text.an6.96:1.1: “Mendicants, the appearance of six things is rare in the world.
translation_text.an6.96:1.3: A Realized One, a perfected one, a fully awakened Buddha. A teacher of the teaching and training proclaimed by a Realized One. Rebirth in a civilized region. Unimpaired sense faculties. Being bright and clever. Enthusiasm for skillful qualities.
translation_text.an6.96:1.4: The appearance of these six things is rare in the world.”

variant_text.an6.96:1.3: paccājāti dullabhā → paccājāto dullabho (sya-all) | kusale dhamme chando → kusaladhammacchando (bj, sya-all, pts1ed)
